evaluation_inputs.system_description: An online credit-card transaction system that receives credit information from terminals, delivers transaction requests to credit-card companies, and transmits responses back to terminals. It requires continuous 24/7 operation and real-time synchronization with backup systems and external databases.

phase_1_discovery.initial_documentation_status: Non-functional requirements were not defined, and stakeholders lacked sufficient knowledge and experience in the system's specific technologies to generate a utility tree via standard brainstorming.
evaluator_inquiry_questions: Do the standard non-functional requirements derived from financial system experience apply to this system?
Can we confirm these prioritized requirements: Performance, Operability, Security, and Usability?

hardware_view_description: Interacts with credit-card terminals and credit-card companies.
runtime_constraints: Must operate 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.
Must complete all internal processing within one second.
Must synchronize in real-time with the backup system.

questions: How does hard-coding message transformations affect maintainability versus performance?
How does the common component definition affect system availability during updates?

raw_candidate_scenarios.description: System should be operational 24 hours a day and 365 days a year.

Credit-card terminal is supposed to request transaction processing at any time including peak-time and system should proceed all internal processing within one second besides external transaction processing with credit-card company.
System should ensure the information integrity with credit-card company.
System should be synchronized in real-time with backup system and database of NIBS.

business_goals: Run 24 hours a day, 365 days a year
Provide online credit card transaction services
Establish risk mitigation strategies for identified risks
Suggest and evaluate new architectural alternatives
technical_constraints: System should be operational 24 hours a day and 365 days a year
System should be synchronized in real-time with backup system and database of NIBS

architectural_approaches.approach_name: AA-OL-01 Defining commonalities for the whole system and applications
architectural_approaches.description: Decomposing system's application units and defining interfaces and components among application units to minimize development and maintenance efforts.

addressed_attributes.rationale: Minimizing efforts necessary for developing new, maintenance, and education because of reducing LOC by raising reusability level.

architectural_approaches.approach_name: AA-OL-02 Defining redundantly similar transaction flow and business logic for each service
architectural_approaches.description: Developing and deploying independently for a specific work.

architectural_approaches.approach_name: AA-OL-03 Transforming messages and inputs/outputs by hard coding
architectural_approaches.description: Hard coding the message transformation logic to achieve high speed.

addressed_attributes.rationale: Achieving high speed through transforming messages and inputs/outputs by hard coding.

architectural_approaches.approach_name: AA-OL-03-Alt-01 Parameter based message transformation using database
architectural_approaches.description: Using a database to store message parameters instead of hard coding them.

addressed_attributes.rationale: No need to change relevant components or redeploy whenever a message is changed; only new values are added to the database.

children.scenario_description: Credit-card terminal is supposed to request transaction processing at any time including peak-time and system should proceed all internal processing within one second besides external transaction processing with credit-card company.
System should be operational 24 hours a day and 365 days a year.
System should ensure the information integrity with credit-card company.
System should be synchronized in real-time with backup system and database of NIBS.

scenarios.scenario_text: System should be operational 24 hours a day and 365 days a year.

Credit-card terminal is supposed to request transaction processing at any time including peak-time and system should proceed all internal processing within one second besides external transaction processing with credit-card company.
System should ensure the information integrity with credit-card company.

scenario_reference.text: System should be operational 24 hours a day and 365 days a year

architectural_decisions: AA-OL-01 Defining commonalities for the whole system
analysis_records.reasoning: In case of changing common components, this causes system deactivation and re-operation.

risks.description: In case of changing common components, this causes system deactivation and re-operation.
risks.rationale: Risk factor as for reliability and availability.

scenario_reference.text: System should be operational 24 hours a day and 365 days a year

architectural_decisions: AA-OL-03 Transforming messages and inputs/outputs by hard coding
analysis_records.reasoning: In case of changing a message of credit-card company, this causes system deactivation and re-operations for re-deploying relevant component.

risks.description: In case of changing message of credit-card company, this causes system deactivation and re-operations for re-deploying relevant component.
risks.rationale: Risk factor as for reliability, availability, and maintainability (Probability: High/Very Likely; Risk Level: Medium/Critical).

non_risks.rationale: Non-risk as for processing time and delay.

architectural_decisions: AA-OL-03-Alt-01 Parameter based message transformation using database
analysis_records.reasoning: Improving message transformation by hard coding into parameter based transformation alternative has performance degradation risk.

risks.description: Performance degradation is possible by using database.
risks.rationale: Database IO vs Hard coded memory operations.

non_risks.description: Parameter based design minimized the source code changes and thereby hot deploy of component may be reduced.
non_risks.rationale: Non-risk for reliability, availability, and maintainability.
